relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file (salary_credits.json) describes salary credit transactions flowing from Accounts to Credit, while the outbound file (monthly_repayment_direct_debit.json) describes loan repayment instructions flowing from Credit back to Accounts. These represent opposite transaction flows with fundamentally different purposes: salary deposits vs. loan repayments. While both involve bank accounts and currency, the semantic domains are distinct—salary credits are income deposits, repayments are debt collections. The outbound file contains loan-specific fields (loanId, directDebitMandateId, dueDate) with no corresponding concepts in the inbound schema, and the outbound repayments array structure does not logically derive from the inbound salary credit structure.
